title: WCAG 2.2 Success Criterion 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)
summary: WCAG requires a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text (18px bold or 24px regular) between text and its background.
supportingClaims: Text contrast below 4.5:1 fails WCAG AA and is the most common accessibility failure in web interfaces.
Large text has a relaxed threshold of 3:1 but still requires deliberate color selection.
